commands.cmd: audit T012 primary-source map against current Nutrition domain and Pantry ownership

summary: Approved a three-file pure-domain package for versioned reference metadata, life-stage and UL scope, disclosures, gap detection, and the current FDA adult/children 4+ Daily Value table. Deferred numeric DRI rows and persisted canonical-code expansion to later evidence/migration reviews.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit without returning, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
